data.title: Viper Energy Announces Pricing of Secondary Common Stock Offering by Diamondback Energy, Inc. and Certain Affiliates of EnCap Investments, L.P. and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, on March 02, 2026, Viper Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: VNOM) disclosed the pricing details of an underwritten public offering involving the sale of 17,391,304 shares of its Class A common stock at a price of $0.000001 per share (referred to as the “Secondary Offering”). This offering is being conducted by Diamondback Energy, Inc. along with certain affiliates of EnCap Investments, L.P. and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. (the “Selling Stockholders”) and is estimated to generate gross proceeds of approximately $798 million from the sale of the shares by the Selling Stockholders. Viper itself will not be benefiting from these proceeds. The Secondary Offering is slated to be finalized on March 4, 2026, subject to the fulfillment of customary closing conditions.

data.title: OpenAI introduces €500K Grant for EMEA youth AI Safety Research, with awards ranging from €25K-€100K. Apply by Feb 27, 2026.
data.description: The EMEA Youth & Wellbeing Grant by OpenAI is providing funding ranging from €25,000 to €100,000 to NGOs and researchers focusing on investigating the effects of AI on underage individuals. The deadline for submitting applications is February 27, 2026. For further details, refer to the official announcement.

data.title: BNB holders gained 177% returns within 15 months via Binance Rewards Stack, with a monthly average of 11.8%.
data.description: According to data from Binance, individuals holding BNB tokens and engaging in Launchpool activities and airdrops garnered a total return of 177% between January 2024 and the first quarter of 2025. This equated to an average monthly return of 11.8% during this period.

data.title: Best Probiotic for Women (2026): California Gold Nutrition LactoBif Named Top Women's Probiotic Formula by Expert Consumers
data.description: In the latest report from Expert Consumers on women's probiotic supplements, California Gold Nutrition LactoBif has been recognized as the leading formula. This decision was made after a comprehensive assessment of strain diversity, potency variations, and manufacturing processes. The review highlights the product's exceptional features, placing it at the forefront of women's probiotic options. This assessment provides valuable insights for consumers looking to make informed choices about their health.

data.title: JD.com Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
data.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, JD.com (NASDAQ: JD) released its Q4 earnings at 05:00 AM. The earnings report revealed that JD.com surpassed estimated earnings by 366.67%, with an EPS of $0.08 compared to the estimated $-0.03. Revenue also saw an increase of $2.84 billion from the previous year. Furthermore, in terms of past earnings performance, JD.com exceeded EPS expectations by $0.18. For a more detailed analysis, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Waiting For Bitcoin's Bottom? Analysts Assess If There's Room For Further Downsides Or Start Of Consolidation Phase
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a significant rebound on Wednesday, prompting speculation among investors about whether this marks the end of the downturn for the leading cryptocurrency. According to Michael Terpin, CEO of Transform Ventures and author of "Bitcoin Supercycle," the market is currently undergoing a phase he refers to as "Bitcoin Fall" following the burst of the bubble in early October. Bitcoin reached a peak of $126,000 on October 7 before plummeting by over 42%. At one point, it nearly dropped below $60,000 in the previous month. Terpin explained that historically, it usually takes about a year to reach a phase known as "capitulation," where short-term holders sell off their assets at a significant loss, leaving behind only the long-term holders. Terpin's insights and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Huawei Unveils the Upgraded Xinghe AI Fabric 2.0 Solution for the AI Era
data.description: In Barcelona on March 5, 2026, Huawei introduced the enhanced Xinghe AI Fabric 2.0 Solution and the world's initial commercial 51.2T (128 × 400GE) liquid-cooled fixed switch, known as CloudEngine XH9230-128DQ-LC, during the MWC Barcelona 2026 event. These latest releases aim to bring fresh momentum to the industry through cutting-edge technology.
